case_title: CONSUELO B. JACKSON VS. DEREK WASHINGTON

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JACKSON, CONSUELO B. ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY JACKSON, CONSUELO B. AS TO DEFENDANT WASHINGTON, DEREK (FUNERAL BY WASHINGTON) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-28-2015 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-28-2015 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF'S DAUGHTER TO OCT-29-2015 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT BUT WAS REPRESENTED BY HER DAUGHTER--SHARANDA SMITH, ONLY. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
